{{Quote|NT, set course for Dur Sabon|[[Vilmarh Grahrk]], to [[NT 600|his]] [[astronavigation droid]]|<ref name="Deal" />}}
'''Dur Sabon''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] inhabited by an [[Dur Sabon (species)|eel-like species]] of the same name.<ref name="CE" /> Above the planet’s [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]] level rose [[City/Legends|cities]] on large rocky platforms supported by descending pillars. In the sky above the cities, a series of spheres of unknown purpose hovered.<ref name="Deal" /> Around [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]], the young [[Ootoolan]] [[Princess/Legends|princess]] [[Foolookoola]] was escorted to Dur Sabon for her safety from the nearby planet [[Ootoola]]. Friends of the late [[Royal family of Ootoola|royal family]] gave her shelter and expressed hope that she would one day return home safely.<ref name="Deal" />
